_comment: EXAMPLE config for the Clairvoyance Versioning Backup System. Copy to config.json, replace every <PLACEHOLDER> and example path with your interview values, and delete the _comment* keys (the engine ignores unknown keys; these are annotations only). All paths are Windows paths with escaped backslashes.
_comment_instanceName: Destination subfolder name for this machine. Default to the PC hostname; use a nickname if multiple Clairvoyance installs share one PC.
_comment_backupRoot: Destination root. A UNC share (\\server\share\...) or a local/second-disk path (e.g. D:\Backups\Clairvoyance). Per-instance tiers are created under <backupRoot>\<instanceName>\.
_comment_copyMethod: robocopy (default, needs elevation for /B open-file copy) | vss | appclose | tar.
_comment_toolDir: <TOOL_DIR> is the permanent local fixed-disk tool directory chosen in Step 5a. stagingDir holds the persistent robocopy mirror (needs room for ~one uncompressed daily set); it may point at a roomier disk instead of <TOOL_DIR> if needed.
_comment_abortAfterLocalTime: Guard: a real (non -RunDate) run aborts if it starts after this local time, to avoid overrunning a reboot/maintenance window. Set just before that window.
_comment_deepVerifySample: How many random files to extract FROM the destination archive and hash-check after upload.
_comment_secretsCredentialName: Fallback: name of an environment variable holding the AES passphrase if the DPAPI passphraseFile is absent. The DPAPI-sealed passphraseFile is the primary mechanism (Step 7).
_comment_retention: How many of each tier to keep. -1 = keep all. Weekly slot = lastDayOfWeek; monthly = month-end; annual = year-end.
_comment_secretsRetention: Shorter prune schedule applied to the encrypted *_secrets archives.
_comment_sources: Non-workspace source roots. The home-appdata excludeDirs above are the standard Electron caches (safe to keep as-is). Add/remove dependency entries as needed.
_comment_workspaceDefaults: Applied to every auto-discovered workspace unless overridden in workspaceTuning. artifactDirs are routed to the weekly incremental Artifacts tier instead of the daily set.
_comment_workspaceTuning: Per-workspace overrides, keyed by workspace folder name. Exclude regenerable dirs (venv/.venv/site-packages, model blobs, node_modules, downloads) from the daily set. encrypt=true (F6a) routes that workspace's daily files into the AES-256 _secrets.7z instead of the plaintext _main.7z. WARNING: encrypting a workspace means losing the passphrase makes it unrecoverable — default false; only encrypt genuinely sensitive workspaces.
_comment_secretsSet: Files/dirs always routed to the encrypted archive and excluded from the plaintext main archive. Match-Secret (F7) is depth-agnostic: a bare filename matches at any depth; dir/** matches that directory anywhere. Confirm/add during interview Step 9.
_comment_secretScanPatterns: Regexes the pre-compress leak scan (F7) warns on if matched inside the plaintext set. Extend for your own token shapes.
_comment_orchestrators: Staff that run automated pipelines and must pause during backup (Step 8 / §9a). pauseCompliance: unverified | compliant | noncompliant. Empty array is fine if none.
